Meet Our Doctor

Qualified, compassionate and dedicated to delivering exceptional healthcare in Oshakati.

🌿
Expert Care
Principal Doctor
Dr. Alma Negonga
MBChB · General Practitioner & Aesthetic Physician

Dr. Alma Negonga is the founder and principal doctor at Yatenya Medical Practice & Wellness Centre. With her MBChB qualification and additional training in aesthetic medicine, she brings a unique breadth of expertise that spans traditional general practice and modern wellness treatments.

Her vision for Yatenya was to create a practice where every patient — regardless of background — receives world-class care in a warm, welcoming environment. She is particularly passionate about women's health, HIV management, and helping her patients achieve their wellness goals.

Qualifications & Expertise

MBChB — Bachelor of Medicine & Surgery

Qualified General Practitioner

Aesthetic Medicine (AMCSA Certified)

Injectables, fillers, body contouring & skin treatments

HIV Clinical Management & PrEP/PEP

Specialist HIV testing, counselling & management

Women's Health & Antenatal Care

Pregnancy testing, antenatal monitoring & family planning

Book with Dr. Negonga
